title: [backport v3.0] Bump github.com/containernetworking/cni from 0.8.0 to 0.8.1
body:
Bumps [github.com/containernetworking/cni](https://github.com/containernetworking/cni) from 0.8.0 to 0.8.1.
- [Release notes](https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/releases)

is the ubuntu-2004 remote failure a known one?

I'll spin up a machine to try out myself.
